About Me

I am a passionate software developer with a keen interest in AI/ML and UI/UX design. I enjoy turning complex problems into elegant, user-centric solutions. My goal is to build scalable applications that make a real impact.

Case Studies

Engineered Solutions

A deep dive into systems designed for performance, impact, and user satisfaction.

TypeLabs

High-Fidelity Typing Engine & Performance Diagnostics

Challenge

Online typing tests are often generic, slow, and lack actionable, millisecond-accurate latency details on individual keystrokes to help users address bottlenecks.

Approach

Engineered a custom React application with strict state isolation and hardware-accelerated micro-interactions via GSAP. Programmed precise keypress event telemetry to measure inter-character delay instantly.

Outcome

Delivered an ultra-responsive interface with sub-10ms response times. Features include a dynamic character-level heat map and interactive typing metrics that increased user retention.

React GSAP Node.js Vercel Telemetry API
Live Product View Source

Strict React state isolation prevents rendering delays, enabling sub-10ms keypress telemetry capture.

Week 1-2

Telemetry engine construction & microsecond event hooking.

Week 3

Integration of hardware-accelerated GSAP rendering.

Week 4

Data visualizations for character latency completed.

Challenge: React Render Lag

State updates on fast keypresses (>120 WPM) caused slight visual stutter in metric displays.

Solution: Bypassed React state for typing log events, streaming key delta logs to a raw JS memory buffer and rendering via requestAnimationFrame.

Keystroke Telemetry Latency 8ms (Max)
Render Refresh Rate 60 fps (Solid)
Generic Typing Tests Static text, block re-renders, generic stats
TypeLabs Engine Keystroke heatmaps, fluid GSAP feedback

GitCommitter

Automated Workspace Hook & Commit Quality CLI

Challenge

Developers face speed overhead and format inconsistencies when writing commit logs. This degrades commit history readability and halts automation in continuous pipelines.

Approach

Designed a lightweight Node.js terminal app interacting with the system's local Git config. Built an interactive CLI wizard that auto-validates code diffs, prompts for details, and formats standard Conventional Commits.

Outcome

Eliminated manual commit formatting errors. Sped up repository commit loops by roughly 40% and improved searchability inside collaborative project histories.

Node.js Git API CLI Frameworks Shell Scripting
Live Demo View Source

Seamless node wrapper intercepts commit actions, parsing diffs instantly to generate standardized logs.

Week 1

CLI core command harness & Git configuration setup.

Week 2

Hook shell runner script & automated parser implementation.

Challenge: Hook Bypass Vectors

Git standard hooks bypass config layers if developer invokes commands with specific override flags, risking formatting errors.

Solution: Hooked deep into git-core config, auto-routing execution pipelines through custom shell script overlays to enforce compliance.

Commit Formatting Rate 100% Accuracy
Commit Pipeline Speed Improvement 40% Saved Time
Manual Typing Prone to conventional commit spelling and type mismatches
GitCommitter CLI Interactive wizard prompts, strict lint, auto-commit
Featured centerpiece

TypeLabs Showcase

Test the typing core telemetry engine live. Measure your millisecond-accurate keystroke latency.

High-Fidelity Telemetry

TypeLabs was engineered to demonstrate microsecond-accurate keyboard event recording and rendering. It parses keystrokes inside an isolated thread and outputs detailed performance statistics.

Isolated State Loop

Prevents render thrashing and allows typing speeds >200 WPM without key drops.

Micro-telemetry Engine

Captures keystroke flight time, release time, and overlap delay in milliseconds.

GSAP Dynamic Rendering

Hardware-accelerated interface reactions that feed active visual rewards to typists.

TypeLabs Telemetry Sandbox

100% Accuracy
--ms Avg Latency

Interests & Direction

What I'm Exploring

Keeping a pulse on emerging tech, frameworks, and patterns that will define the future of business.

AI Agents & RAG

Constructing multi-agent nodes that collaborate using custom databases to autonomously solve support, research, and analysis workflows.

Scalable SaaS

Studying multi-tenant database designs, dynamic billing architectures, and high-conversion landing page heuristics for digital products.

No-Code & Custom API Loops

Synthesizing webhooks, triggers, and automated logic bridges to bypass manual back-office tasks and save human hours.

Premium Dark UI

Investigating spatial UI layout, dynamic lighting styles, variable letter-spacing, and micro-physics animations that drive high retention.

Tech to Revenue Systems

Mapping software code directly to operational leverage. Designing architectures that reduce server costs while facilitating scalability.

Velocity Over Perfection

Optimizing developer tools, scaffolding setups, and modern frameworks to ship robust MVPs in days rather than months.
